description: Plugin-distributed hooks for brand-identity-studio. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location, not the consumer's project root. The single hook is ADVISORY (stderr, always exit 0) — the real workflow gates are skill preconditions.

hooks.comment: Flag brand anti-patterns on brand-conventional files: non-self-hostable fonts in a token export, un-curated concepts in a client-facing file, logo regeneration-in-Firefly, and un-routed trademarkability/IP claims. Advisory only — prints to stderr, always exits 0, never blocks.
